title: T-027 — pending-receipts + PO lines APIs (06-b)
prompt:
# T-027 — pending receipts + PO lines

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-BE-020/021
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Land `GET /api/warehouse/scanner/pending-receipts` (PO/TO awaiting receipt with urgency dot) and `GET /api/warehouse/scanner/po/:id/lines` (per-line ordered/received/remaining/uom/catch_weight_required), both RLS-scoped on org_id + session site_id.

## Implementation contract
1. Two route handlers under apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/.
2. urgency dot rule: red ≤1d to ETA, amber ≤3d, blue otherwise.
3. Single Drizzle query each (no N+1).

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/pending-receipts/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/po/[id]/lines/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/warehouse-receive.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/warehouse-pending-receipts.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 1 PO with ETA tomorrow and 1 PO with ETA in 5 days, when GET /pending-receipts runs, then the response carries urgency='red' for the first PO and 'blue' for the second
2. Given a PO not in the user's site, when GET /po/:id/lines runs, then the response is 404 SC_PO_NOT_FOUND
3. Given a PO with three lines (60/100, 0/40, 50/50 received), when GET /po/:id/lines runs, then the response carries lines in stable order with remaining values 40, 40, 0 and the line with remaining=0 has flag fully_received=true

## Test strategy
- RED: write warehouse-pending-receipts.test.ts asserting urgency dots + RLS 404 + remaining math before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/warehouse-pending-receipts'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return cross-site POs in /pending-receipts
- Do not omit catch_weight_required flag on lines
- Do not issue more than one SQL query per endpoint

pipeline_inputs.description: GET /pending-receipts (with urgency dot) + GET /po/:id/lines, both RLS-scoped + single-query.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two handlers. urgency dot computed server-side from ETA. Lines payload includes catch_weight_required so SCN-020 can branch. RLS via org_id + session site_id. Single query per call.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the receive POST here (T-028)
Do not implement TO list filtering here (covered by /pending-receipts unioning TO)
Do not build SCN-020 UI here (T-031)

Given a PO not in the user's site, when GET /po/:id/lines runs, then the response is 404 SC_PO_NOT_FOUND
Given a PO with lines (60/100, 0/40, 50/50), when GET /po/:id/lines runs, then remaining values are 40/40/0 in stable order and the 50/50 line carries fully_received=true
test_strategy: RED: write warehouse-pending-receipts.test.ts asserting urgency + RLS + remaining math before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not issue more than one SQL query per endpoint
